tasks.description: Fix HSC code extraction from text: space-aware regex, match.index context, letter-prefix codes
build: **Bug 1 — Space-containing codes:** Current regex `/\b(\d{2}\.\d{2,3}[A-Z]{0,3})\b/g` cannot match codes like '03.7 A' or 'E  1'. Add space-tolerant pattern: `/\b(\d{2}\.\d{1,3}\s?[A-Z]{0,3})\b/g`.

**Bug 2 — Context check uses indexOf:** Line 172 uses `text.indexOf(code)` which finds the first occurrence, not the current match. Replace with `match.index` for correct position-based context checking.
**Bug 3 — No letter-prefix pattern:** Add second pattern `/\b([A-Z]\s*\d{1,3}[A-Z]?)\b/g` for E/X-prefixed codes.
frd: V2 FRD Section 3, SCR-110: Fix HSC code extraction from text

tasks.description: Fix age restriction and anesthesia extraction: missing patterns, dead code removal
build: **Bug 1 — Missing 'under X years' pattern:** Add patterns for 'under X years of age' and 'younger than X years' where the keyword appears BEFORE the number.
Add to AGE_PATTERNS: `{ tag: 'max_years', regex: /(?:under|younger\s+than)\s+(\d+)\s*years/i }` and similar for months.
**Bug 2 — Compound age dead code:** Remove the compound check at lines 227-241 — it can never trigger because AGE_PATTERNS already matches 'under X years' individually.

**Bug 3 — Anesthesia regex too strict:** Fix `extractAnesthesiaRequirement` (line ~314) to match 'under anesthesia' without requiring 'general'. Change to: `/(?:under\s+(?:general\s+)?anesthesia|requires?\s+(?:general\s+)?anesthesia|procedural\s+sedation)/i`
frd: V2 FRD Section 3, SCR-111: Fix age restriction extraction

tasks.description: Fix frequency restriction extraction: 'once every N years', 'per shift', compound patterns
build: **Bug 1 — 'once every N years' not captured:** The general frequency regex uses `(?:per|every|each)` but the 'every' path doesn't work correctly for 'once every 3 years'. Add `in\s+a` as alternative connector.
**Bug 2 — 'per shift' missing:** Add 'shift', 'session', 'admission' to the period alternation in the freqPattern regex (line ~291).
**Bug 3 — Compound frequency:** For patterns like 'maximum of 15 calls or 6 hours per day', capture the first part (15 calls per day) and log the compound nature.
frd: V2 FRD Section 3, SCR-112: Fix frequency restriction extraction

tasks.description: Fix specialty restriction extraction: colon-delimited lists, fragment filtering
build: **Add colon splitting:** Handle colon-delimited specialty lists like 'Psychiatry: Adult Psychiatry' by splitting on `: ` when followed by a capital letter.
**Add semicolon splitting:** Handle semicolons as delimiters.
**Add 'those' to filter list:** The existing filter at line 104 skips common stopwords but misses 'those'.
frd: V2 FRD Section 4, SCR-120: Fix specialty restriction extraction

tasks.description: Fix GR 1.33 code pattern to allow codes without alpha suffix
build: Change code pattern from `/\b(\d{2}\.\d{2}[A-Z]{1,3})\b/g` (requires alpha suffix) to `/\b(\d{2}\.\d{2,3}[A-Z]{0,3})\b/g` (allows zero alpha suffix characters).
This ensures codes like '03.03' without alpha suffixes are captured from GR 1.33 text.
frd: V2 FRD Section 4, SCR-121: Fix GR 1.33 code pattern

tasks.description: Add discovery cache invalidation with --force-discovery flag and staleness check
build: 3. Before using cached codes, check file age via `fs.statSync(cachePath).mtimeMs`.
4. Skip cache if `FORCE_DISCOVERY` is true or cache is older than 7 days.
5. Log cache age and --force-discovery hint when using cache.
frd: V2 FRD Section 5, SCR-130: Add discovery cache invalidation

tasks.description: Add circuit breaker for mass scraping failure
build: 2. Track `let consecutiveErrors = 0;` inside the scrape loop.
3. Reset to 0 on each successful scrape.
4. Increment on each error. If `consecutiveErrors >= CIRCUIT_BREAKER_THRESHOLD`, log a clear error message and break out of the loop.
5. Save progress before breaking to preserve successfully scraped data.
frd: V2 FRD Section 5, SCR-131: Add circuit breaker for mass failure

tasks.description: Replace hardcoded governing rule range 1-19 with dynamic discovery
build: 1. Fetch the governing rules listing page at `${BASE_URL}/governing-rules`.
2. Extract rule IDs from links matching `/governing-rules/(\d+)`.
3. Also check expandable/viewable tree nodes for data-key attributes.
4. Fallback to 1-19 if discovery finds nothing.
5. Replace `for (let i = 1; i <= 19; i++)` in `scrapeGoverningRules` with the discovered IDs.
frd: V2 FRD Section 5, SCR-132: Dynamic governing rule discovery

tasks.description: Fix metadata rootSectionKeys count to use actual discovered count
build: 1. Change `discoverAllHscCodes` return type to `{ codes: string[]; rootSectionKeyCount: number }`.
3. In `main()`, destructure the return value and set `counts.rootSectionKeys` to the actual count instead of 0.
4. Update line 1021 from `rootSectionKeys: 0` to use the actual value.
frd: V2 FRD Section 5, SCR-133: Fix metadata rootSectionKeys count

tasks.description: Fix fetchWithRetry to cover response body transfer in timeout
build: **Problem:** `clearTimeout(timer)` is called at line 74 after `await fetch()` resolves (headers received). But `await resp.text()` at line 87 can still hang if the body stalls.
**Fix:** Move `clearTimeout(timer)` to AFTER `await resp.text()` completes. Keep clearTimeout in error/retry branches.
const resp = await fetch(url, { ...options, signal: controller.signal, ... });
// Don't clearTimeout here — body may still be streaming
const body = await resp.text(); // Timer still running — abort on stall
frd: V2 FRD Section 6, SCR-140: Cover response body transfer in timeout

tasks.description: Add common named HTML entity decoding (nbsp, ndash, mdash, smart quotes)
build: Add these replacements BEFORE the numeric entity handlers and AFTER the existing named entities:
frd: V2 FRD Section 6, SCR-141: Add common named HTML entity decoding

tasks.description: Extend validateResponse block indicator check window and add indicators
build: 1. Increase check window from 2000 to 5000 characters.
2. Add block indicators: 'blocked', 'cloudflare', 'please verify you are human'.
3. Keep existing indicators: 'captcha', 'access denied', 'rate limit exceeded', 'too many requests'.
frd: V2 FRD Section 6, SCR-142: Extend validateResponse block indicator check

tasks.description: Fix modifier eligibility deduplication in scraper and unique index in schema
build: **Part A — Scraper dedup:** Add `deduplicateModifierRows` function in `scripts/scrape-fee-navigator.ts`:
Key by `${hscCode}|${type}|${code}|${calls}` to deduplicate rows. Call after flattening modifier Maps to arrays in the save step.
**Part B — Schema fix:** In `packages/shared/src/schemas/db/reference.schema.ts`, update the `hsc_modifier_eligibility` unique index to include the `calls` column:
Change from `.on(table.hscCode, table.modifierType, table.subCode, table.versionId)` to `.on(table.hscCode, table.modifierType, table.subCode, table.calls, table.versionId)`.
Generate migration with `pnpm --filter api drizzle-kit generate`.
frd: V2 FRD Section 7, SCR-150: Fix modifier eligibility deduplication

tasks.description: Fix calls empty string handling in seed to use explicit check
build: Change `calls: m.calls || null` to `calls: m.calls === '' ? null : m.calls`.
This makes the empty-string-to-null conversion explicit rather than relying on JS falsy coercion.
frd: V2 FRD Section 7, SCR-151: Fix calls empty string handling in seed

tasks.description: Preserve explanatory code category in seed as severity mapping
build: Map the scraped `e.category` to the `severity` column instead of hardcoding 'INFO':
Also set `commonCause`, `suggestedAction`, and `helpText` to null explicitly.
frd: V2 FRD Section 7, SCR-152: Preserve explanatory code category in seed

tasks.description: Filter self-referencing bundling pairs and fix description direction
build: 1. Add `if (h.hscCode === excl.excludedCode) continue;` to skip self-referencing pairs.
2. Fix description to use canonical form: `${codeA} and ${codeB} may not be claimed together` instead of using the original direction which may be reversed after canonical reordering.
frd: V2 FRD Section 7, SCR-153: Filter self-referencing bundling pairs

tasks.description: Wrap all seed inserts in a database transaction
build: Wrap all insert operations inside `await db.transaction(async (tx) => { ... })`. Replace all `db.insert(...)` calls with `tx.insert(...)` inside the transaction callback.
The idempotency check (line 213-218) should remain OUTSIDE the transaction.
This ensures that if any insert fails, all changes are rolled back atomically.
frd: V2 FRD Section 7, SCR-154: Wrap seed inserts in transaction

tasks.description: Widen action varchar margin in modifier eligibility schema
build: Change the `action` column in `hsc_modifier_eligibility` from `varchar(30)` to `varchar(50)` to prevent truncation of longer modifier action descriptions.
frd: V2 FRD Section 7, SCR-155: Widen action varchar margin

tasks.description: Tighten validation completeness thresholds
build: Update THRESHOLDS to be closer to known counts with ~5% margin:
frd: V2 FRD Section 8, SCR-160: Tighten completeness thresholds

tasks.description: Add modifier row deduplication check to validation
build: In `scripts/validate-fee-navigator-data.ts`, add after section E1 (modifier row validation):
Add E2: dedup check — key modifier rows by `${hscCode}|${type}|${code}|${calls}`, count duplicates.
If 0 duplicates: pass('No duplicate modifier rows').
frd: V2 FRD Section 8, SCR-161: Add modifier row deduplication check

tasks.description: Add enrichment minimum thresholds to validation (replace unconditional pass)
build: In `scripts/validate-fee-navigator-data.ts`, replace the unconditional pass() calls at lines 366-374:
Add ENRICHMENT_MINIMUMS array with [label, count, minimum] tuples:
fail() if count < minimum, pass() otherwise.
frd: V2 FRD Section 8, SCR-162: Add enrichment minimum thresholds

tasks.description: Add governing rule reference resolution check to validation
build: F3: For each HSC code's governingRuleReferences, check if the reference (or its parent rule number) exists in governing-rules.json.
Use warn() (not fail()) for unresolved references since sub-rules may not have dedicated entries.
frd: V2 FRD Section 8, SCR-163: Add governing rule reference resolution check

tasks.description: Normalize specialty restrictions: filter garbage fragments, title-case
build: 1. Filter values starting with common fragment prefixes: 'physicians', 'those', 'with', 'working', 'in', 'at', 'for', 'by'.
5. Apply in `extractSpecialtyRestrictions` after splitting, before dedup.
frd: V2 FRD Section 9, SCR-170: Normalize specialty restrictions

tasks.description: Clean modifier definition descriptions: remove AMA footer, de-duplicate name
build: 1. Remove AMA footer text: `.replace(/\s*Alberta Medical Association.*$/i, '').trim()`
2. Remove leading modifier name duplication: if description starts with `name`, strip it.
3. If nothing remains after cleanup, fall back to using `name` as the description.
frd: V2 FRD Section 9, SCR-171: Clean modifier definition descriptions

tasks.description: Add visit-codes-without-modifiers audit check to validation
build: H1: Count HSC codes where feeType is 'VISIT' that have zero rows in hsc-modifiers.json.
If count > 70: warn (may indicate scraping issue).
This is a warning, not an error — some visit codes genuinely lack modifiers.
frd: V2 FRD Section 9, SCR-172: Audit visit codes without modifiers

tasks.description: Re-run full pipeline (scrape, enrich, validate) and verify improvements
tasks.verify: ./apps/api/node_modules/.bin/tsx scripts/validate-fee-navigator-data.ts 2>&1 && pnpm --filter shared build 2>&1 && pnpm --filter api vitest run src/domains/reference/reference.test.ts 2>&1
